top_signals.title: China Adds to US Soy Buying With Biggest Daily Deal Since 2023
top_signals.summary: China purchased the largest amount of US soybeans since 2023, extending a wave of buying as agricultural trade between the world’s two largest economies gathers pace.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Halo stocks are benefiting from the AI boom, Goldman Sachs says. Here are the European firms they're backing - CNBC
top_signals.summary: Halo stocks are benefiting from the AI boom, Goldman Sachs says. Here are the European firms they're backing  CNBC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Trump loses latest appeals court bid to restore his name to Kennedy Center
top_signals.summary: The appeals court said Trump had failed to provide any evidence that the Kennedy Center's fundraising would be harmed if his name is not attached.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: India central bank seeks to bar financial institutions from exposure to crypto assets: Reuters
top_signals.summary: India's central bank called for banks to be barred from crypto exposure as it reiterated support for tighter restrictions on digital assets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Supreme Court allows Texas app law requiring age verification to take effect
top_signals.summary: A student advocacy organization and tech trade group had appealed to the high court to stay the Texas App Store Accountability Act on an emergency basis until the lower court rules.
